title: Protector
original_title: บอดี้การ์ดหน้าหัก
overview: 'Kum Gon'​, a bank security guard Just on duty and about to going home. Meanwhile Kam Gon going home, The terrorist incident is chasing after 'Mr Chun Khempin', the neighboring country's president. Kam Gon has seen and assisted Mr Chun inadvertently and that causing the hunting unit to kill them both.
